rationale: Clear, plain-English opening with useful specifics like assessed value, market value, and mill rate. The tone is friendly and reader-aware. But the piece is incomplete, cuts off mid-sentence, and never fully explains how tax rates are set or why bills change year to year, which hurts flow and overall effectiveness.
